S.FORM: Vajiralongkorn Mntucing hngkawas 1952 idas 7 jiyax 28 ka Vajiralongkorn ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Thailand ta sayang o kiya ka Vajiralongkorn, pnaah hngkawas 2016 idas 10 jiyax 13 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: *aɟiɾaloŋkoɾn mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka *aɟiɾaloŋkoɾn ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan tħailand ta sajaŋ o kija ka *aɟiɾaloŋkoɾn, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: Vajiralongkorn Mntucing hngkawas 1952 idas 7 jiyax 28 ka Vajiralongkorn ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Thailand ta sayang o kiya ka Vajiralongkorn, pnaah hngkawas 2016 idas 10 jiyax 13 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: *aɟiɾaloŋkoɾn mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka *aɟiɾaloŋkoɾn ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan tħailand ta sajaŋ o kija ka *aɟiɾaloŋkoɾn, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
